title: Physurus repens
taxonomy: Physurus repens is classified in the kingdom Plantae, family Fabaceae, subfamily Faboideae. It belongs to the genus Physurus, which is a group of flowering plants native to Australia. The species repens refers to the plant's habit of growth, with Physurus repens being a spreading or twining climber. Physurus repens is also known as a type of pea or legume, with a close relationship to other members of the Fabaceae family. This classification is based on its morphological characteristics and genetic relationships with other plants in the kingdom.
